title: [feat] CI/CD integration command (apiaudit ci)
description: Add an 'apiaudit ci' command that exits non-zero when P1/P2 findings exist. Suitable for GitHub Actions to block merges with breaking API changes. Should support --fail-on flag to configure which severity levels cause failure.

title: Test scanners against real NestJS projects
[feat] Response validation against OpenAPI spec
description: Compare actual API responses against the generated OpenAPI spec. Flag mismatches like 'spec says string but endpoint returns number'. Requires --live flag (depends on live API testing feature).

title: Wire annotate command to invoke Claude for swagger insertion
Test Flask scanner against real project
Homebrew tap setup for apiaudit
Create PR: feat/api-audit-cli to main
close_reason: PR ready at https://github.com/Saltrenis/APIAudit/pull/new/feat/api-audit-cli - gh CLI not installed

title: Tune beads issue creation: priorities, deduplication, batch limits
Implement Fastify and Koa scanner support
[feat] Watch mode for development (apiaudit watch)
description: Add 'apiaudit watch' command that re-runs audit on file changes during development using fsnotify. Provides instant feedback loop. Should debounce rapid changes and only re-scan affected files when possible.

title: Add dated filename logic for --output report saving
Test scanners against real Express projects
Test scanners against real FastAPI projects
Add version flag and main.version variable for ldflags
Tag v0.1.0 and trigger release pipeline
Test Chi scanner against real project
[feat] Multi-project auto-detection from root
description: Auto-detect backend and frontend in separate subdirectories from a project root. Support .apiaudit.json config with backend/frontend paths. The --frontend-dir flag exists but detection from root (e.g., finding go.mod in backend/ and package.json in frontend/) should work automatically.

title: Test scanners against real Django REST projects
Test scanners against real Gin projects
Test Echo scanner against real project
Add no-frontend warning and static analysis prompt flow
Add go install and build instructions to README
[feat] PR comment integration (apiaudit ci --github-comment)
description: Post audit findings directly on GitHub PRs as review comments. Requires GitHub token. Should post a summary comment and optionally inline comments on specific files. Works with the CI command.

title: [feat] Diff mode - only show new findings since base branch
description: Add 'apiaudit diff --base main' command that compares findings against a base branch and only reports NEW findings. Without this, every CI run reports the same findings and teams ignore them. Needs to store/compare finding sets between runs.

title: CI/CD pipeline: GitHub Actions for build, test, release
Add unit tests for scanner parsers
[feat] Historical tracking and trend reporting
description: Store audit results over time in .apiaudit-history.json and show trends (coverage going up/down, new findings per week). Add --history flag to show trend data. Useful for tracking API quality improvements.

title: [feat] Plugin system for custom analyzers
description: Let users write custom analysis rules (e.g., 'all DELETE endpoints must require admin role', 'all POST endpoints must validate request body'). Could use a simple Go plugin or YAML-based rule definition.

title: Create Saltrenis/homebrew-tap repo and migrate formula
[feat] Baseline/ignore file (.apiaudit-ignore)
description: Support .apiaudit-ignore file to suppress known findings (like .eslintignore). Without this, reports are noisy with known issues and users stop reading them. Should support ignoring by category, file path, or specific route patterns.

title: [feat] Rate limit detection in middleware analysis
description: Flag endpoints missing rate limiting middleware. Analyze middleware chains to detect which routes have rate limiting and which don't. Report as P3 findings with suggestions.

title: [feat] HTML report output format
description: Add --format html that generates a standalone HTML file with interactive tables, charts, and filtering. Shareable with non-technical stakeholders or attachable to PRs. Similar to test coverage reports.

title: [feat] Live API testing with --live flag
description: Add --live flag to audit command that hits running endpoints with curl/HTTP requests and compares actual responses against frontend expectations. Currently only does static analysis. Should detect runtime mismatches (wrong response shapes, missing fields, status code issues).
